column1: Spawns small crates. Set the X of the spawn time to your desired spawn cooldown
Spinning blade that damages anything that touches it
Swims very fast\n<color="green">Massive stat boosts in water

Take a look at the top left corner.

The big number is your health.
The smaller number is your stamina.

If stamina goes below 0, you get K/O'd.
Take a look at the upper left corner.\nThe big number is your health, the smaller, stamina.\nIf stamina goes below 0, you get knocked out.
Take things slowly and carefully. This is a tactical game.
Tanky, with bad weapon handling\n<color="green">Hold CTRL/LMB to spit out cobweb
